sections.paragraph:
Φίλιππος, ου, ὁ [φίλος, ἵππος] Philip

—1. the tetrarch, son of Herod 1 and Cleopatra of Jerusalem Mt 16:13; Mk 8:27; Lk 3:1.

—2. first husband of Herodias Mt 14:3; Mk 6:17.

—3. one of the twelve apostles Mt 10:3; Mk 3:18; Lk 6:14; J 1:43-46, 48 and freq. in J; Ac 1:13.

—4. noted figure in the community of believers Ac 6:5 (one of seven helpers or assistants); 8:5 and oft. in the same chapter; cited as evangelist 21:8.
